title: T-004 — quality_holds + quality_hold_items schema + RLS (09-a-01)
prompt:
# T-004 — quality_holds + quality_hold_items schema + RLS

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_holds DDL, §6.3 quality_hold_items, §9.1 RLS, §13.1 RBAC
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the quality_holds and quality_hold_items physical tables with sequences, retention generated columns, RLS policies, and Drizzle schema entries. Foundation for entire 09-a hold/release sub-module.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0100_quality_holds.sql` per §6.3 verbatim DDL: quality_hold_seq SEQUENCE START 1000, quality_holds with hold_number GENERATED, retention_until GENERATED, all CHECK constraints, idx_holds_active and idx_holds_ref indexes; quality_hold_items with UNIQUE(hold_id, license_plate_id).
2. RLS enable + tenant_isolation policy USING/WITH CHECK (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid) per §9.1.
3. Drizzle ORM schema files `packages/db/src/schema/qualityHolds.ts` + `qualityHoldItems.ts` with typed Insert/Select; export from schema index.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0100_quality_holds.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityHolds.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityHoldItems.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/quality-holds-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0100 applied, when \d quality_holds is run, then all columns from §6.3 exist (hold_number, hold_seq, reference_type CHECK, priority CHECK, hold_status CHECK, retention_until GENERATED) and RLS is enabled
2. Given two tenants A and B, when each inserts a quality_holds row and SELECTs as their own tenant, then each sees only its own row (tenant_isolation policy enforced)
3. Given a quality_holds row with id X, when 2 quality_hold_items are inserted with the same (hold_id=X, license_plate_id=L), then the second insert fails with UNIQUE violation

pipeline_inputs.description: Create quality_holds + quality_hold_items tables with sequences, generated columns, indexes, RLS, and Drizzle schemas.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0100 emits CREATE SEQUENCE quality_hold_seq, CREATE TABLE quality_holds and quality_hold_items per §6.3 (including hold_number GENERATED, retention_until GENERATED, all CHECK constraints, idx_holds_active partial index, idx_holds_ref index, UNIQUE on quality_hold_items). RLS tenant_isolation policy applied per §9.1. Drizzle ORM mirrors columns with InsertSchema/SelectSchema. Tests verify schema shape, RLS isolation across two tenants, and UNIQUE constraint on quality_hold_items.
out_of_scope: Do not implement audit triggers here (T-009)
Do not build CRUD API (T-006) or release flow (T-007)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0100 applied, when \d quality_holds runs, then all §6.3 columns exist (hold_number, hold_seq, reference_type CHECK, priority CHECK, hold_status CHECK, retention_until GENERATED) and RLS is enabled
Given two tenants A and B, when each inserts a row and SELECTs under their own org_id setting, then each sees only its own row
Given a quality_holds row, when two quality_hold_items insert with the same (hold_id, license_plate_id), then the second insert fails with UNIQUE constraint violation
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/quality-holds-schema.test.ts asserting all 3 ACs (schema introspection, RLS isolation, UNIQUE) before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-holds-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not skip RLS policy (BRCGS Issue 10 + tenancy mandate)
Do not change column names from §6.3 verbatim DDL (downstream consumers depend on names)
Do not forget retention_until GENERATED column (BRCGS 7y)
